title: Dry Wood Fired Croatian Shiitake Mushroom Bake
description: A winey and crunchy Croatian dish featuring shiitake mushrooms, wood-fired-bake, and low-carb-friendly ingredients, perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Preheat the wood fired oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the shiitake mushrooms with olive oil, garlic, and thyme until they are evenly coated.
Season the mushrooms with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a small bowl, whisk together the red wine and chicken broth.
Add the wine mixture to the mushrooms and toss to combine.
Transfer the mushrooms to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the mushrooms from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the mushrooms hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
